listCustomArmor.name: Ironbound Armour
listCustomArmor.description:
This heavy armour is forged from the recovered plates of an Ironbound Razorback. The overlapping metal scales lock together with a deep mechanical clunk when the wearer braces for impact.

Benefit While wearing this armour, you gain resistance 2 to physical damage.

Ironbound Charge Once per day, you can thunder forward like the beast whose hide formed this armour.
listCustomArmor.action0desc:
Activate Ironbound Charge
Frequency once per day.
Requirements You are wearing Ironbound Armour.

You Stride up to twice your Speed in a straight line and then make a melee Strike. If the Strike hits, the target must attempt a Fortitude save against your class DC.

Success The target suffers no additional effect.
Failure The target is knocked prone.
Critical Failure The target is knocked prone and pushed 10 feet away from you.

listCustomEquipment.name: Medal of the First Hunter
listCustomEquipment.description:
A bronze medal bearing the image of the three great beasts of the Hunt Trial. The reverse is engraved with the names of previous champions and the motto: To Know the Prey is to Claim the Victory.

Benefit Apply the Medal of the First Hunter custom buff to gain a +2 item bonus to Survival.

Champion's Insight Once per session, you may study a creature, hazard, trap, or battlefield and ask the GM one question. The GM must answer truthfully, though the answer may be brief or incomplete.
listCustomEquipment.action0desc:
Champion's Insight
Frequency once per session.

You study a creature, hazard, trap, or battlefield and ask the GM one question. The GM must answer truthfully.

Example questions:
- What is this creature's greatest strength?
- What behaviour does this creature rely on?
- What tactic would most hinder this creature?
- What feature of this creature should concern me most?

listCustomEquipment.name: Stormfeather Cloak
listCustomEquipment.description:
A cloak woven from the charged feathers of a Stormfeather Roc. The feathers twitch faintly in storm winds and crackle with blue-white sparks when danger is near.

Benefit While wearing this cloak, apply the Stormfeather Cloak custom buff to gain resistance 5 to electricity damage.

Stormfeather Glide You take no damage from falling, provided you are conscious and able to move.

Stormfeather Ascent Once per day, you may briefly ride a surge of storm wind.
listCustomEquipment.action0desc:
Stormfeather Ascent
Frequency once per day.

You gain a fly Speed equal to your Speed for 3 rounds. When the effect ends, the cloak catches the air beneath you, allowing you to descend safely.

listCustomAnimalCompanions.name: Tyrant Oozeling
listCustomAnimalCompanions.description: A fist-sized fragment of the Corrosive Slime Tyrant, awarded to the hunters who subdued its progenitor. It is curious, semi-domesticated, and contains tiny flecks of armour, bone, and metal suspended inside its translucent body.
listCustomAnimalCompanions.special:
Special Abilities

Corrosive Touch

Can dissolve simple locks, rusted hinges, chains, and other mundane objects given sufficient time.
Cannot damage magical items.

Slime Scout

Can squeeze through extremely small openings.
Can retrieve small objects.
Can carry messages.
Can investigate confined spaces.

Acid Sense

Can identify acids, poisons, and alchemical substances.
Grants a +2 circumstance bonus when assisting with such identification.

advancedAction.name: SLime Scout
advancedAction.description: "The Tyrant Oozeling squeezes through a tiny opening, retrieves a small unattended object, carries a short message, or investigates a confined space. The GM determines what it can reasonably accomplish."
